example: We should protect the environment for future generations.
Factories need to reduce pollution to keep the air clean.
We can save energy by turning off the lights when leaving.
The city plans to plant more trees in public parks.
Many people now recycle waste such as paper and plastic.
Everyone should throw away rubbish properly to keep the streets clean.

vietnamese: gây ô nhiễm không khí / nước
example: Cars and motorbikes cause serious air pollution in big cities.
Using too much plastic harms the environment.
